children.heading: Assessment and listing of facilities
children.label: a Assessment and listing of facilities

children.text: not later than , the President shall complete preliminary assessments of all facilities that are contained (as of ) on the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Information System (CERCLIS) including in each assessment a statement as to whether a site inspection is necessary and by whom it should be carried out; andJanuary 1, 1988October 17, 1986

not later than , the President shall assure the completion of site inspections at all facilities for which the President has stated a site inspection is necessary pursuant to paragraph (1).January 1, 1989

children.heading: Evaluation
children.label: b Evaluation
children.text: Within 4 years after , each facility listed (as of ) in the CERCLIS shall be evaluated if the President determines that such evaluation is warranted on the basis of a site inspection or preliminary assessment. The evaluation shall be in accordance with the criteria established in under the National Contingency Plan for determining priorities among release for inclusion on the National Priorities List. In the case of a facility listed in the CERCLIS after , the facility shall be evaluated within 4 years after the date of such listing if the President determines that such evaluation is warranted on the basis of a site inspection or preliminary assessment.October 17, 1986October 17, 1986October 17, 1986section 9605 of this title

children.heading: Explanations
children.label: c Explanations
children.text: If any of the goals established by subsection (a) or (b) are not achieved, the President shall publish an explanation of why such action could not be completed by the specified date.
not fewer than 275 by the date 36 months after , andOctober 17, 1986

if the requirement of paragraph (1) is not met, not fewer than an additional 175 by the date 4 years after , an additional 200 by the date 5 years after , and a total of 650 by the date 5 years after .October 17, 1986October 17, 1986October 17, 1986
